mnemonics: CRIMSON for Corrupting Images (Contrast, Resolution, Intensity, Noise, Sensitivity to Unwanted Movement)
FOUR EYES for Filtering out unwanted noise (Frequency, Operations, Unequal, Effects on Zero-level intensities)
PILLAR for Perfecting Image Linear Least Squares Algorithm (Partial Least Squares Algorithm, Iterative, Linear, Least squares, Regularization)
keyPoints: 10.1: Introduction to image degradation and restoration
10.2: Mathematical model of image degradation/restoration process
